data.body: Classification: llm-behavioral. Root cause: Sprint SKILL.md Step 10a lacked an explicit re-dispatch rule — after verifier returned FAIL and a fix was applied, confidence bias caused the orchestrator to skip re-dispatching the verifier. Fix: added explicit re-dispatch rule (d039-ac65) at Step 10a dispatch point. No confidence-based bypass permitted; only technical failure (timeout/unparseable JSON) exempts re-dispatch.
